# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  HRMS Backend – Python Requirements
#  Django + PostgreSQL + Redis + Celery
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

# Core framework
Django==6.0.5
asgiref==3.11.1
sqlparse==0.5.5

# REST API
djangorestframework==3.17.1
uritemplate==4.2.0

# JWT authentication
djangorestframework-simplejwt==5.5.1

# CORS (allow React frontend to call the API)
django-cors-headers==4.9.0

# Query filtering  (?status=Active&department=IT)
django-filter==25.2

# Auto-generated OpenAPI / Swagger docs
drf-spectacular==0.29.0
inflection==0.5.1
jsonschema==4.26.0
jsonschema-specifications==2025.9.1
referencing==0.37.0
rpds-py==2026.5.1

# PostgreSQL driver
psycopg2-binary==2.9.12

# Redis client
redis==8.0.0

# Django Redis cache backend
django-redis==7.0.0

# Async task queue (payroll processing, email notifications)
celery==5.6.3
kombu==5.6.2
amqp==5.3.1
billiard==4.2.4
vine==5.1.0
click-didyoumean==0.3.1
click-plugins==1.1.1.2
click-repl==0.3.0
prompt_toolkit==3.0.52
wcwidth==0.7.0

# Image / file handling (employee photos)
# 10.2.0+ has prebuilt Windows wheels — 10.1.0 breaks on newer pip
Pillow==10.4.0

# Environment variable management (.env file)
python-decouple==3.8

# Production WSGI server
gunicorn==26.0.0

# Serve static files without a CDN
whitenoise==6.12.0

# Timezone support
tzdata==2026.2
tzlocal==5.3.1

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#  Development & Testing only
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

# Model factories for tests
factory-boy==3.3.3
Faker==40.21.0
attrs==26.1.0

# Test coverage reports
coverage==7.6.1

# Useful management commands (shell_plus, etc.)
django-extensions==4.1
